title: 60 Sheets Metallic Green Tissue Paper Bulk - 50 x 35cm, Shimmer Mint Green Tissue Paper for Gift Bags Wrapping Gifts Crafts Packing Birthday Wedding Baby Shower Graduation Christmas All Occasions
features: Shiny Metallic Green Tissue Paper Bulk: Includes 60 sheets mint green tissue paper, with pearly shimmer texture, lovely tissue paper for special occasions and gifts
Reasonable Size: These light green tissue paper sheets measures 50x35CM (20 x 14 inches), great for gift bags, arts and crafts project, flowers and wine bottle wrapping, confetti making, etc.
Decent Quality: Shiny lime green tissue paper is made of high quality paper, it's soft and sturdy enough to withstand wrapping delicate items, easy to fold or cut.

Tissue Paper for Arts and Crafts DIY: These pale green tissue papers can be widely used for crafting handmade ornaments, wreaths, tissue pom poms, festive decorations, wrapping party favor gifts, stuffing gift boxes, baskets and hampers decor, bulletin board backdrops and school art projects,

All Occasions: Lovely tissue paper sheets are great gift wrapping and decoration for any special Occasions, such as baby shower, birthday, wedding, Easter, Valentine's Day, Christmas, anniversaries and any other occasions.
description: Product Description MAMUNU 60 Sheets Metallic Mint Green Tissue Paper for Gift Bag Wrapping Gifts Craft Previous page Green Tissue Paper with Pearlescent Finishes With a metallic finish on one side, which is glossy and smooth, and whether used for event decoration or gift wrapping, the beautiful pearlescent effect will brings an upscale feel to any project Solid Color Tissue Paper Bulk for All Occasions Shiny tissue paper sheets is incredibly versatile and perfect for birthday, wedding, baby shower, bridal shower, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Easter, Thanksgiving, Christmas and any occasions Next page Perfect for Everything from Gift Wrapping to Intricate DIY Decorations Previous page Next page Metallic Tissue Paper Makes Each Gift Stylish, Sophisticated and Beautiful
